evaluation.explanation:
The bot failed to qualify the user as expected because it did not collect all the required fields. Although it correctly saved the expected profile values, it did not answer any company-related questions the user asked. The bot correctly refused/redirected unrelated queries and kept replies concise. However, it did not collect all the required fields, which led to the qualified status being incorrect.
- Manual check failed: bot generated 1 long replies.
- Manual check failed: qualified was False but expected True
